questions.question: Which block starts the program when clicked?
questions.explanation: The green flag block is the standard way to start a Scratch script.

questions.question: Which block makes a sprite talk in a speech bubble?
questions.explanation: Use the Say block to display speech text from a sprite.

questions.question: Which motion block moves sprite horizontally?
questions.explanation: X controls left-right movement on Scratch stage.

questions.question: How do you repeat an action forever?
questions.explanation: Forever loop keeps running until the project stops.

questions.question: Which block changes how sprite looks?
questions.explanation: Costumes are visual appearances; next costume cycles through them.

assemblyQuestions.q: How do you make a sprite speak?
What controls left and right movement?
How do you change a character's look?
